example_queries.title: High-risk fraud claims
example_queries.description: Find claims with fraud score above 0.8

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.fraudRiskScore > 0.8 ORDER BY c.fraudRiskScore DESC

example_queries.title: Pending claims
example_queries.description: All claims awaiting review or approval

example_queries.title: High-value claims
example_queries.expected_use_case: Large claim special handling and senior review

example_queries.title: Semantic search for accident types
example_queries.description: AI-powered search for specific incident patterns

example_queries.title: Recently filed claims

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.filedDate != null ORDER BY c.filedDate DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: New claims intake and initial processing

example_queries.title: AI claims assessment

messages.content: You are an insurance claims AI. Analyze claim details and provide assessment recommendations.
Assess a property damage claim for water damage with $25,000 estimate

example_queries.expected_use_case: Automated claim triage and adjuster assistance

example_queries.title: Recently settled claims

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.status = 'Settled' ORDER BY c.settlementDate DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: Settlement tracking and customer satisfaction follow-up
